description_long: This object consists of two rectangular, deep containers joined together by a central vertical post. The containers have a wooden texture on their sides, with vertical grooves suggesting paneling, and are capped with dark green rims that extend slightly outward. The central post is also wood-textured and appears to provide structural support, connecting the two containers firmly. The interiors of the containers are open and hollow, indicating they are designed to hold or collect items. The base of each container is slightly wider, providing stability, and the overall construction suggests durability for outdoor use. The design is simple yet robust, suitable for urban environments such as parks or sidewalks.
description: A dual-compartment wooden container with green rims, joined by a central post, designed for outdoor urban use. Each compartment is open and deep, suitable for holding or collecting items.
description_view_0: Front view showing one container with its green rim and the central post partially visible behind.
description_view_1: Side view displaying both containers fully, joined by the central post, with the open tops and green rims clearly visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, showing the second container and the central post.
description_view_3: Opposite side view to view 1, again showing both containers and the central post, emphasizing the dual-compartment structure.
